**What & why**
<!-- One or two sentences. -->

**Checklist**
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` and `npm test` pass (Node 24+)
- [ ] Added a test for the behavior change / a regression test for the fix
- [ ] Kept the read-only / fail-silent / zero-dependency invariants
- [ ] If a threshold changed: backtest evidence + a CHANGELOG entry
